# AI-boomens oväntade vinnare

**Feed**: kort-och-lang  
**Published**: 2026-06-15  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode covers the near-resolution of the USA-Iran conflict, with markets rising ~1.5% and oil falling to its lowest since early March on hopes of a ceasefire and a permanent peace deal by Friday. The hosts also discuss SpaceX's blockbuster US listing, which surged ~19% to a valuation around 20,000 billion SEK (over 100x sales despite losses), framing it as a sign of intense retail demand and FOMO around Elon Musk's brand rather than fundamentals.

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
